Advertising Workshop

If you love advertising, Reklam Atölyesi is your second home. By taking your place in our agencies, you can reinforce what you have learned, multiply your experience

, and experience the excitement of winning a contract before you start your business life. You can fill your portfolio with extra success

. At least you can come and meet friends and have a coffee. The workshop is already in your blood.
